title: Duch-orbitalstrike-cannon
description: Plugin inspired by cubicmetere. Adds orbital cannon rods, timed strike commands, stab shafts, wolf support, and stasis jumps for Paper servers
body:
# 🛰️ Duch Orbital Strike Cannon

**Duch Orbital Strike Cannon** is an explosive Paper plugin that adds special fishing rods capable of calling orbital strikes, nukes, stasis teleports, and wolf support.

Inspired by powerful orbital cannon-style mechanics, this plugin is perfect for PvP servers, events, minigames, or simply creating absolute chaos with friends. 🔥

## ✨ Features

- 🛰️ **Orbital Stab Shot**  
  A fast, precise TNT strike from above.

- 💥 **Nuke Shot**  
  A massive orbital nuke with configurable ring size from **16 to 50**.

- 🐺 **Wolf Rod**  
  Summons an army of tamed wolves with speed, strength, and fire resistance effects.

- 🌀 **Stasis Rod**  
  Teleports the player to saved coordinates or to the block they are looking at.

- 🎣 **Rod-Based Activation**  
  Special combat rods trigger their effects when used.

- ⏱️ **Delayed Strikes**  
  Strikes can be scheduled with a short delay for more cinematic impact.

- 🧭 **Tab Completion Support**  
  Commands include tab suggestions for attack types, coordinates, values, and options.

- ⚙️ **Custom Messages**  
  Plugin messages can be edited in `messages.yml` with MiniMessage support.

## 📜 Commands

### Item Command

```txt
/duch-orbitalstrike-cannon stab [amount]
/duch-orbitalstrike-cannon nuke <rings> [amount]
/duch-orbitalstrike-cannon wolf <wolves> [amount]
/duch-orbitalstrike-cannon stasis <crosshair|x y z> [amount]
